paper_interpretation: Clean replay and clean trace files produced no detected faults.
Injected action flips changed the action sequence and were detected through SHA-256 trace mismatch.
Forced generator calls after action=0 were detected as unauthorized invocations at the invocation boundary.
Post-hoc action changes in saved traces were detected through SHA-256 action-trace mismatch.
Dropped trace rows were detected through row-count mismatch and SHA-256 action-trace mismatch.
Duplicated trace rows were detected through row-count mismatch and SHA-256 action-trace mismatch.
